high.title: Application signed with debug certificate
high.description: Application signed with a debug certificate. Production application must not be shipped with a debug certificate.

high.title: Certificate algorithm vulnerable to hash collision
high.description: Application is signed with SHA1withRSA. SHA1 hash algorithm is known to have collision issues.

high.title: Debug Enabled For App [android:debuggable=true]
high.description: Debugging was enabled on the app which makes it easier for reverse engineers to hook a debugger to it. This allows dumping a stack trace and accessing debugging helper classes.

high.title: Debug configuration enabled. Production builds must not be debuggable.
high.description:
Debug configuration enabled. Production builds must not be debuggable.
